name: Standard Chartered DigiSmart Credit Card
exclusions: benefits are merchant-offer led and depend on promo codes and partner caps
additionalBenefits: 10% off at Blinkit with monthly cap
10% off at Zomato with per-transaction and monthly usage limits
Buy 1 Get 1 movie ticket free at INOX on Saturdays and Sundays
Yatra discounts on flights and hotel bookings
15% cashback on Ola cab bookings up to monthly cap

salaried: Minimum monthly income of INR 50,000 is required
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Standard Chartered approval criteria
